ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Total runs batted in by the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles hit by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples hit by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the teams table */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the seasons table */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the players table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonuses or incentives */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)
